extension.description:
Zeus768's Kodi addon repository.
Available Addons: - SALTS (Stream All The Sources) v2.1.1 - 35+ scrapers, free streams, autoplay, Up Next, Skip Intro, Trakt, debrid support - Orion - Torrent and usenet indexer - Strike Zone - Sports streaming addon - The Accountant - Kodi maintenance and debrid management tool - ResolveURL - URL resolver module
